texto: It was the first time that I had ever been in a town where the working class was in the saddle. Practically every building of any size had been seized by the workers and was draped with red flags or with the red and black flag of the Anarchists
autor: every wall was scrawled with the hammer and sickle and with the initials of the revolutionary parties
explicacao: Citação de every wall was scrawled with the hammer and sickle and with the initials of the revolutionary parties sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “It was the first time that I had ever been in a town where the working class was in the saddle. P…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e trabalho.
